intent: After the flood — Professor Wren, whom Caden saved, and Caden. His reflection reacts to the conviction he stated in the classroom: the guilt is fixed, but its shape is the player's. The prologue's emotional close.

n0.text: You pulled me out of the water. You shouldn't have — and you understand that now, don't you.

caden_protect.text: I told them I was here to keep people safe. I drowned a town to keep one. That's the man I am now.

caden_purpose.text: I wanted to know what I was for. Now I do. This — this is the thing I'm for.

caden_unsure.text: I said I didn't know what I was for. I know now. I would give anything not to.

caden_none.text: There isn't a word for what I did. I've looked for one. There isn't.
